scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck:app && pnpm --filter @workspace/mock-test run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.typecheck:app: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/mock-test run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
